title: [ExportVerilog] Improve XMR emission when used as bound inputs

features.name: xmr bound instance connection with struct field access
features.description: Code should include a bind statement with an instance that connects XMR paths including struct field access
features.snippet: struct packed {logic x; logic y; } _T; wire _T sig; assign sig = middle.bottom.O; bind Top m inst(.a(sig), .b(middle.bottom.I.x));

features.name: xmr path through two-level instance hierarchy
features.description: Code should include XMR references that traverse two levels of instance hierarchy (module.instance.signal)

features.name: xmr bound port connection with struct type
features.description: Code should include bind instance ports connected to XMR paths where the XMR target is a struct-typed signal
features.snippet: struct packed {logic x; logic y; } sig; wire sig = middle.bottom.O; bind Top inst(.a(sig));
